title: lithocarpus pinatubensis
intro: Lithocarpus pinatubensis, also known as the Pinatubo copper beech, is a species of beech tree native to the Philippines. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off fungal infections due to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Lithocarpus pinatubensis include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce stress, and improve overall cardiovascular health. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas or infusions, which are used to treat a range of ailments, including fever, coughs, and digestive issues.
